name: caption-editor
description: A WebVTT caption file editor with media playback support, including synchronizing selected caption with the current position of the media playback.
author: Thad Hughes

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:rust: bazelisk build //transcribe_rs/transcribe-rs //transcribe_rs/embed-rs && mkdir -p dist-rust && cp -f bazel-bin/transcribe_rs/transcribe-rs/transcribe-rs bazel-bin/transcribe_rs/embed-rs/embed-rs dist-rust/ && chmod +x dist-rust/transcribe-rs dist-rust/embed-rs && npm run build:wespeaker-onnx
scripts.package: npm run build:all && npm run build:rust && electron-builder --mac --win --linux -c.extraMetadata.version=$(node -p "require('fs').readFileSync('electron/constants.ts','utf8').match(/APP_VERSION = '(.+)'/)[1]")
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:all && npm run build:rust && electron-builder --mac -c.extraMetadata.version=$(node -p "require('fs').readFileSync('electron/constants.ts','utf8').match(/APP_VERSION = '(.+)'/)[1]")
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:all && npm run build:rust && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run build:all && npm run build:rust && playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run build:all && npm run build:rust && playwright test --headed
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:unit:coverage && npm run test:e2e --reporter=html && npx nyc report --reporter=text --reporter=html
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:build

mac.identity: Developer ID Application: Christopher Thaddeus Hughes (RWVMRK3723)
